basic_details.job_title: NHSRC Lead Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) Lead Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website .the NHSRC Lead Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS / BDS, MD / Postgraduate Degree in Community Medicine / Social & Preventive Medicine, Master’s in Public Health (MPH), MHA
qualification.details: MBBS / BDS + one of the following postgraduate qualifications (regular full-time mode only): MD / Postgraduate Degree in Community Medicine / Social & Preventive Medicine, Master’s in Public Health (MPH), Postgraduate Diploma in Healthcare Management, MHA (Master of Hospital Administration) – only full-time 2-year programme. Minimum 10 years post-PG experience in implementation/supporting large-scale national health care programmes.

selection_process: Application Screening Written Test (1:5 ratio if conducted) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHSRC Lead Consultant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHSRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHSRC Lead Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NHSRC Lead Consultant – Knowledge Management Division (KMD) position is 02-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Lead Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS/BDS degree along with a postgraduate qualification such as MD, MPH, Postgraduate Diploma in Healthcare Management, or a full-time 2-year MHA. Minimum 10 years of post-PG experience is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 55 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Lead Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. ₹1,30,000 to ₹1,70,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NHSRC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Lead Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve application screening, followed by a written test (if conducted with a 1:5 ratio), and finally an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The position is contractual in nature, offering a defined term of employment.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the 'Important Links' section of this article. The official website of NHSRC is also provided there.
